title: Experiment Findings
description: Prediction-vs-outcome table with discrepancy analysis for one iteration.

iteration.description: Iteration number (0 = first experiment, increments on each DONE -> DESIGN transition).

experiment_valid.description: Whether the experiment execution was sound. False if commands used wrong flags, parameters were misconfigured, or the experimental setup did not match the intended design.

dominant_component_pct.description: Percentage of total effect from single dominant component, if detected.

worktree_uncommitted_writes.description: #230 — paths the executor wrote inside the experiment worktree without declaring them in the bundle's `code_changes`. Surfaced just before worktree cleanup; logged at WARNING. Empty array (or absent) means the executor declared everything it wrote, or wrote nothing untracked. The orchestrator does not block cleanup on undeclared writes — this is a tripwire, not a gate.

metadata.description: Optional domain-specific metadata for this arm result.

shape_match.description: True if observed_shape matches the arm's expected_shape.

dose_points.description: Observed (knob_value, metric_value) pairs for h-dose-response arms.

primary_change_observed.description: Observed change in primary metric for h-tradeoff arms.

secondary_change_observed.description: Observed change in secondary metric for h-tradeoff arms.

tradeoff_verdict.description: Verdict for h-tradeoff arms; cost_too_high is the new failure mode this arm unlocks.
